name: PER_ALLOCATED_TASKS_VL
query: SELECT B.ALLOCATED_TASK_ID, B.SURVEY_RESPONSE_ID, B.ALLOCATED_CHECKLIST_ID, B.STAGE_ALLOCATED_CHECKLIST_ID, NVL(TL.TASK_NAME, B.TASK_NAME) TASK_NAME, NVL(TL.DESCRIPTION, B.DESCRIPTION) DESCRIPTION, NVL(TL.ACTION_URL, B.ACTION_URL) ACTION_URL, TL.TASK_DETAILS, TL.USER_DISPLAY_NAME, TL.MEETING_LOCATION, B.MANDATORY_FLAG, B.STATUS, B.PERFORMER_ORIG_SYSTEM, B.PERFORMER_ORIG_SYS_ID, B.TASK_OWNER_PERSON_ID, B.TASK_SEQUENCE, B.TARGET_START_DATE, B.TARGET_END_DATE, B.ACTUAL_START_DATE, B.ACTUAL_END_DATE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, B.ATTRIBUTE1, B.ATTRIBUTE2, B.ATTRIBUTE3, B.ATTRIBUTE4, B.ATTRIBUTE5, B.ATTRIBUTE6, B.ATTRIBUTE7, B.ATTRIBUTE8, B.ATTRIBUTE9, B.ATTRIBUTE10, B.ATTRIBUTE11, B.ATTRIBUTE12, B.ATTRIBUTE13, B.ATTRIBUTE14, B.ATTRIBUTE15, B.ATTRIBUTE16, B.ATTRIBUTE17, B.ATTRIBUTE18, B.ATTRIBUTE19, B.ATTRIBUTE20, B.ATTRIBUTE21, B.ATTRIBUTE22, B.ATTRIBUTE23, B.ATTRIBUTE24, B.ATTRIBUTE25, B.ATTRIBUTE26, B.ATTRIBUTE27, B.ATTRIBUTE28, B.ATTRIBUTE29, B.ATTRIBUTE30, B.INFORMATION_CATEGORY, B.INFORMATION1, B.INFORMATION2, B.INFORMATION3, B.INFORMATION4, B.INFORMATION5, B.INFORMATION6, B.INFORMATION7, B.INFORMATION8, B.INFORMATION9, B.INFORMATION10, B.INFORMATION11, B.INFORMATION12, B.INFORMATION13, B.INFORMATION14, B.INFORMATION15, B.INFORMATION16, B.INFORMATION17, B.INFORMATION18, B.INFORMATION19, B.INFORMATION20, B.INFORMATION21, B.INFORMATION22, B.INFORMATION23, B.INFORMATION24, B.INFORMATION25, B.INFORMATION26, B.INFORMATION27, B.INFORMATION28, B.INFORMATION29, B.INFORMATION30, B.TASK_OWNER_USERNAME, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15, B.TASK_PERCENTAGE_COMPLETE, B.RESPONSIBILITY_TYPE, B.RESPONSIBILITY_TYPE_GUID, B.TASK_COMMENTS, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.TASK_IN_CHECKLIST_ID, B.RESP_PERFORMER_AVAILABILITY, B.DEFAULT_PERF_RESP_TYPE, B.ACTION_TYPE, B.TASK_CONFIGURATION, B.TASK_ACTION_ID, B.DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID, B.FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE, B.DEF_ALLOCATION_DATE, B.DEPENDENT_ON_TASKS, B.ACTIVATION_ELIGY_PRFL_ID, B.REMINDER_RECURRENCE, B.REMINDER_DURATION, B.REMINDER_RELATIVE_TO, B.GENERATE_ATOM_FEED, B.ATOM_FEED_CONFIGURATION, B.TARGET_DURATION, B.TARGET_DURATION_UOM, B.TASK_DELAY_DURATION, B.TASK_DELAY_DURATION_UOM, B.MEETING_OFFSET, B.MEETING_TIME, B.EXPIRY_DAYS, B.DETAIL_CHECKLIST_ID, B.CONTACT_DETAILS, B.DETAIL_ALLOC_CHECKLIST_ID, B.OWNER_RESP_TYPE, B.ABS_ALLOCATED_CHECKLIST_ID, B.OWNER_RESP_TYPE_USERS, B.TASK_ACTION_CODE, B.SIGN_TEMPLATE, B.SIGN_DOCUMENT, B.COMPLETED_BY, B.COMPLETION_DATE, B.ESIGN_TYPE, B.SIGN_DATE, B.SIGNER_NAME, B.SIGNER_EMAIL, B.DOCUMENT_ENTITY_ID, B.REOPEN_DATE, B.REOPENED_BY, B.REPORT_PATH, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, B.ERROR_DETAILS, B.SIGNER_ADDRESS, B.DOCUMENTS_OF_RECORD_ID, B.TASK_PERFORMERS, B.TASK_OWNERS, TL.NOTE_TITLE, B.ATTACHMENT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID, B.ATT_DOCUMENTS_OF_RECORD_ID, B.LEARNING_ITEM_ID, B.LEARN_CONTENT_TYPE, B.REPORT_PARAMETERS, B.ANALYTICS_PATH, B.ENABLE_TASK_EXPIRY, B.EXPIRY_RELATIVE_TO, B.EXPIRY_DATE, B.TASK_FEATURE1, B.TASK_FEATURE2, B.TASK_FEATURE3, B.TASK_FEATURE4, B.TASK_FEATURE5, B.TASK_FEATURE_DETAILS, B.TASK_INITIATOR, B.TASK_INITIATOR_PERSON_ID, B.REASSIGNED_DATE, B.REASSIGNED_BY, B.COMBINED_NOTIFICATION_ID, B.PROCESSING_MODE, B.NEXT_REMINDER_DATE, B.REMINDER_COUNT, B.REMINDER_TEMPLATE_ID, B.SYNCH_HISTORY, TL.COMPLETE_ACTION_LABEL, TL.REJECT_ACTION_LABEL, TL.SAVE_ACTION_LABEL, TL.CALENDAR_ACTION_LABEL, TL.ACTIVITY_ACTION1_LABEL, TL.ACTIVITY_ACTION2_LABEL, TL.ACTIVITY_ACTION3_LABEL, TL.ACTIVITY_ACTION4_LABEL, TL.ACTIVITY_ACTION5_LABEL, B.VIDEO_TYPE, B.DISPLAY_OPTIONS, B.VIDEO_URL, B.LEARN_ENROLLMENT_ID, B.LEARN_COMMUNITY_ID, B.LEARN_ENROLLMENT_TYPE, B.EMBED_TASK_ACTION_CODE, B.ESIGN_SIGNATURE, B.CONTENT_PROVIDER_CODE, B.EMBED_APP_TASK_TYPE_ID, B.OBJECT_GROUP_CODE, B.ANALYTICS_SUB_TYPE, B.REMINDER_CONTENT_TYPE, B.REMINDER_CONTENT_DEFN_ID, B.GUIDED_JOURNEY_CODE, B.GUIDED_JOURNEY_TASK_CODES, B.ALLOCATION_TIMEZONE, B.DOCUMENT_TYPE_TAGS, B.ATTACHMENT_TYPE_TAGS, B.NOTES_TYPE, B.NOTES_REPORT_PATH, B.COMPLETE_WORKFLOW_CODE, B.SAVE_WORKFLOW_CODE FROM PER_ALLOCATED_TASKS B, PER_ALLOCATED_TASKS_TL TL WHERE B.ALLOCATED_TASK_ID = TL.ALLOCATED_TASK_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
